author: Scout! 🇺🇸🆘
title: Character Design Help Needed

content: I am looking for a professional artist who can create a model based on my pfp My budget is $400 to $500 Anyone interested can comment with their portfolio!!

author: MagicMushMM
title: 3D Animation Artist for Smash Video
content: Alright, I'm gonna go ahead and pull the trigger on this. I'm looking for an artist who's good with 3D Animation, be it Blender/SFM to commission an animation for this Smash video. US only
